raw_description:
The Hilton Salalah Resort overlooks the Indian Ocean in Salalah. Breakfast is served by the temperature-controlled pool and bonfire dinners on the white sandy beach.

Combining modern amenities with traditional Omani features, rooms at Hilton Salalah Resort suggest understated elegance. They all include a lounge and some open out onto balconies with views of palm-fringed gardens and the sea.

2 restaurants, 2 bars and a cafe provide wide culinary alternatives, ranging from seafood specialities to international classics. A pub-like atmosphere with aperitifs and live sport feed can be found at the on-site Mayfair Cafe.

Popular attractions include the Green Wadi Darbat, while Al Salam Street Golden Souk is a 10-minute drive from the Hilton Salalah hotel. Leisure activities feature water sports, tennis, massage treatments and an in-house shopping arcade.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Hilton Salalah Resort. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Beachfront, Free WiFi.
